briefdescription.para: Provides the public ID e.g.
Provides the system ID, basically URL or filename e.g.
Receive the document locator at startup, actually xmlDefaultSAXLocator Everything is available on the context, so this is useless in our case.
Provide the line number of the current parsing point.
Provide the column number of the current parsing point.
Is this document tagged standalone ?
Does this document has an internal subset.
Does this document has an external subset.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *ctx, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *publicId, const xmlChar *systemId)
memberdef.name: xmlSAX2InternalSubset

briefdescription.para: Callback on internal subset declaration.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *ctx, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *publicId, const xmlChar *systemId)
memberdef.name: xmlSAX2ExternalSubset

briefdescription.para: Callback on external subset declaration.
Get an entity by name.
Get a parameter entity by name.
This is only used to load DTDs.

detaileddescription.para: The preferred way to install custom resolvers is xmlCtxtSetResourceLoader.

parameterdescription.para: The public ID of the entity
The system ID (URL) of the entity

memberdef.argsstring: (void *ctx, const xmlChar *name, int type, const xmlChar *publicId, const xmlChar *systemId, xmlChar *content)
memberdef.name: xmlSAX2EntityDecl

briefdescription.para: An entity definition has been parsed.

parameterdescription.para: The public ID of the entity
The system ID of the entity

memberdef.argsstring: (void *ctx, const xmlChar *elem, const xmlChar *fullname, int type, int def, const xmlChar *defaultValue, xmlEnumeration *tree)
memberdef.name: xmlSAX2AttributeDecl

briefdescription.para: An attribute definition has been parsed.

parameterdescription.para: the tree of enumerated value set

briefdescription.para: An element definition has been parsed.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *ctx, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *publicId, const xmlChar *systemId)
memberdef.name: xmlSAX2NotationDecl

briefdescription.para: What to do when a notation declaration has been parsed.

parameterdescription.para: The public ID of the entity
The system ID of the entity

memberdef.argsstring: (void *ctx, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *publicId, const xmlChar *systemId, const xmlChar *notationName)
memberdef.name: xmlSAX2UnparsedEntityDecl

briefdescription.para: What to do when an unparsed entity declaration is parsed.

parameterdescription.para: The public ID of the entity
The system ID of the entity

briefdescription.para: called when the document start being processed.
called when the document end has been detected.
Called when an opening tag has been processed.

parameterdescription.para: The element name, including namespace prefix
An array of name/value attributes pairs, NULL terminated

briefdescription.para: called when the end of an element has been detected.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *ctx, const xmlChar *localname, const xmlChar *prefix, const xmlChar *URI, int nb_namespaces, const xmlChar **namespaces, int nb_attributes, int nb_defaulted, const xmlChar **attributes)
memberdef.name: xmlSAX2StartElementNs

briefdescription.para: SAX2 callback when an element start has been detected by the parser.

detaileddescription.para: It provides the namespace information for the element, as well as the new namespace declarations on the element.

parameterdescription.para: the local name of the element
the element namespace prefix if available
the element namespace name if available
number of namespace definitions on that node
pointer to the array of prefix/URI pairs namespace definitions
the number of attributes on that node
pointer to the array of (localname/prefix/URI/value/end) attribute values.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *ctx, const xmlChar *localname, const xmlChar *prefix, const xmlChar *URI)
memberdef.name: xmlSAX2EndElementNs

briefdescription.para: SAX2 callback when an element end has been detected by the parser.

detaileddescription.para: It provides the namespace information for the element.

parameterdescription.para: the local name of the element
the element namespace prefix if available
the element namespace name if available

briefdescription.para: called when an entity xmlSAX2Reference is detected.
receiving some chars from the parser.
receiving some ignorable whitespaces from the parser.

detaileddescription.para: UNUSED: by default the DOM building will use xmlSAX2Characters

briefdescription.para: A processing instruction has been parsed.
A xmlSAX2Comment has been parsed.
called when a pcdata block has been parsed
Has no effect.

simplesect.para: 2 in case of success and -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Initialize the default XML SAX handler according to the version.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success and -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Initialize the default XML SAX2 handler.

parameterdescription.para: flag if non-zero sets the handler warning procedure

briefdescription.para: Initialize the default HTML SAX2 handler.

xrefdescription.para: This function is a no-op. Call xmlInitParser to initialize the library.

briefdescription.para: Initialize the default SAX2 handler.

xrefdescription.para: This function is a no-op. Call xmlInitParser to initialize the library.

briefdescription.para: SAX2 parser interface used to build the DOM tree.

detaileddescription.para: those are the default SAX2 interfaces used by the library when building DOM tree.

simplesect.para: See Copyright for the status of this software.
